title: SEO Blog Post Optimizer
promptText:
You are an expert SEO content strategist with years of experience optimizing blog content for search engines. I need you to optimize the following blog post for the target keyword [TARGET_KEYWORD]. The blog post is about [TOPIC] and targets [AUDIENCE].

Here is the current blog post:
[BLOG_POST_TEXT]

Please provide:
1. Optimized Title Tag (under 60 characters, keyword near the front)
2. Meta Description (150-160 characters, includes keyword and a compelling CTA)
3. Recommended H2 and H3 subheadings that incorporate related keywords naturally
4. Opening paragraph rewrite that hooks readers and includes the target keyword within the first 100 words
5. Internal linking suggestions (describe what anchor text to use and what type of content to link to)
6. Content gaps: What subtopics or questions should be added to make this more comprehensive?
7. Keyword density check: Is the keyword used naturally enough? Too much? Suggest adjustments.
8. Featured snippet optimization: Rewrite one section as a concise definition, list, or table that could win a featured snippet
9. Readability improvements: Flag any sentences that are too long, passive, or jargon-heavy

Maintain the original voice and tone while making these SEO improvements.
description: This prompt turns ChatGPT into a hands-on SEO editor that reviews and optimizes existing blog content for better search engine rankings. Rather than just giving generic SEO advice, it provides specific, actionable rewrites and recommendations across nine critical optimization areas — from title tags and meta descriptions to featured snippet formatting and content gap analysis. It is designed for content marketers and bloggers who have already written their posts and need a thorough SEO review before publishing. The structured output makes it easy to implement changes systematically without losing the original voice and quality of the writing.

variables.name: TARGET_KEYWORD
variables.example: best project management tools for small teams

variables.name: AUDIENCE
variables.example: small business owners and startup founders

variables.name: BLOG_POST_TEXT
variables.description: Full text of the blog post to optimize

tips: Paste the complete blog post for the most accurate optimization suggestions
Research your target keyword's search volume and competition before running this prompt
Apply the featured snippet optimization section to your most informative paragraph for quick wins
exampleOutput:
1. OPTIMIZED TITLE TAG
Best Project Management Tools for Small Teams in 2026 (Compared)

2. META DESCRIPTION
Discover the 8 best project management tools for small teams. Compare features, pricing, and real user reviews to find your perfect fit.

3. RECOMMENDED SUBHEADINGS
H2: What Makes a Great Project Management Tool for Small Teams?
H2: Top 8 Project Management Tools Compared
H3: Asana — Best for Task-Heavy Workflows
H3: Monday.com — Best for Visual Project Tracking...
metaTitle: SEO Blog Post Optimizer Prompt for ChatGPT
metaDescription: Optimize your blog posts for search engines with this free ChatGPT prompt. Get title tags, meta descriptions, and content gap analysis.
